name: wall
description: Configuration keywords for 'plot item create wall'. Controls wall rendering, transparency, coloring by attributes, cut planes, and legend display.

basic_keywords.description: Show item in plot (default when created)
Set wall transparency level (0 = opaque, 100 = fully transparent)
Show color legend for this item
Configure color scale for numeric/vector attributes
basic_keywords.syntax: color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic

sub_items.name: color-by
sub_items.description: Color walls by vector or text attributes (force-contact, group, name, etc.)

sub_items.name: cut
sub_items.description: Clip visualization with a cutting plane

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create wall active on transparency 70
plot item create wall active on color-by vector-attribute "force-contact" color-options scaled ramp rainbow minimum automatic maximum automatic transparency 50 legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Force distribution on walls with moderate transparency
